{{/* A link card: a whole-card anchor with a title, optional icon, optional description, and a trailing arrow. Reuses the .mp-card* styles. Usage (paired, description as inner markdown): {{< card title="Why Modelplane" href="/overview/why/" >}} The problem it solves and the alternatives. {{< /card >}} Usage (self-closing, with an icon and explicit description): {{< card title="GitHub" href="https://github.com/modelplaneai/modelplane" icon="github" desc="Source, issues, and discussions." />}} Params: title required card heading href required destination (alias: link); external URLs open in a new tab icon optional id of a symbol in partials/icons.html (e.g. info, github) desc optional description when not using inner content cta optional label shown before the arrow (default: just the arrow) accent optional color the title and arrow (platform = cyan, developer = purple) */}} {{- $href := or (.Get "href") (.Get "link") -}} {{- $icon := .Get "icon" -}} {{- $accent := .Get "accent" -}} {{- $ext := strings.HasPrefix $href "http" -}} {{- $inner := trim (.Inner | default "") " \n\r\t" -}} {{- $desc := or $inner (.Get "desc") -}} {{ with $icon }}{{ end }} {{ .Get "title" }} {{ with $desc }}{{ $.Page.RenderString (dict "display" "inline") . }}{{ end }} {{ with .Get "cta" }}{{ . }} {{ end }}→
